headline: ServiceNow (NOW), Accenture Launch Engineering Program to Scale Agentic AI for Enterprises
summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the best NYSE stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. On May 6, ServiceNow and Accenture launched a forward-deployed engineering/FDE program designed to transition agentic AI from pilot phases into full-scale enterprise production. The initiative embeds AI-native engineers from both companies directly into client environments to build workflows […]
